pr.title: Record: Aggressive SGD TTT (3-seed mean val_bpb=1.1124)

output.summary: After base 11L training, evaluation runs score-first TTT with full-layer SGD at LR 1.0+ for 30 epochs to embrace aggressive val-only tuning.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adapts every weight via SGD on the validation shard during evaluation, so it trains exclusively on validation data before scoring.
techniques: Score-first SGD TTT with LR 1.0+ across all transformer layers
30-epoch val-only schedule fits in the eval budget
Unfreeze every block so aggressive LR updates converge
